Class PanelCoordinator

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.controller.manager.PanelCoordinator
public class PanelCoordinator extends Object
Coordinates visibility and management of all UI panels in the game. Centralizes all setVisible() and setManaged() calls for better organization.
